# Air Conditioning Bali

> Bali's trusted air conditioning company. Installation, cleaning, servicing and 24/7 repair across all of Bali. Authorised installer for Gree, Daikin, Panasonic, Mitsubishi Electric, LG and Samsung.

- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 818-0802-9595
- Hours: 24/7 emergency response
- Authorised installer for Gree, Daikin, Panasonic, Mitsubishi Electric, LG and Samsung

For the dynamic, always-current version, fetch /llms.txt from the live site (served by the Next.js route).
